issues.description: Condition missing: 'If your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand' requires condition type 'HandCount' or similar with opponent scope and threshold ≥5. Current condition is 'Always'.

Action type 'ForceDiscard' is incorrect. Effect places card at bottom of deck, not discard. Should be custom action or 'ReturnToHand' is semantically wrong. The DSL lacks a 'PlaceBottomOfDeck' action type. This is a structural game action not covered by standard action set.

Trigger 'Activated' is correct, but missing activation cost specification. Effect requires '[Once Per Turn]' and '[Activate: Main]' which should be encoded in activation metadata (not present in DSL structure).

Action 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Effect requires placing 1 own Character from board (not hand) at bottom of deck. Should reference board Characters, not hand. Action type and target scope are wrong.
AttachDon actions should be conditional on the first action succeeding (placed Character). Structure suggests sequential execution but conditional logic is unclear.
